jobRole.title: Job Role
jobRole.description: Job title to search for (e.g. 'Python Developer', 'Data Scientist').

skills.title: Required Skills
skills.description: List of skills to match against job listings.

yearsOfExperience.title: Years of Experience
yearsOfExperience.description: Minimum years of experience to filter by.

location.title: Location
location.description: City or region to search in (e.g. 'Bangalore', 'Mumbai', 'Remote').

maxDaysOld.title: Max Days Since Posted
maxDaysOld.description: Only include jobs posted within this many days.

jobsPerPortal.title: Jobs Per Portal
jobsPerPortal.description: Maximum number of jobs to collect from each portal.

portals.title: Portals to Search
portals.description: Which job portals to include. Supported values: linkedin, naukri.

useProxy.title: Use Apify Proxy
useProxy.description: Enable Apify residential proxies when running on the Apify platform.

fetchFullDescription.title: Fetch Full Job Description
fetchFullDescription.description: Visit each job's detail page to collect the full description. Slower but richer data.
